title: Internal Dashboard UI Overhaul – Collapsibles, Ticket Actions, Task Management, Client List, GMV Cards, Autocomplete

requirements.text: In the Superadmin dashboard section of frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.tsx, wrap each sub-dashboard (AdminUser, AdminFinance, Asistenmu, Concierge) in a Collapsible component with defaultOpen=true. Each collapsible trigger must display the dashboard name as a CardTitle inside a CardHeader.

quotes: dashboard superadmin: tambahkan collapsible untuk setiap dashboard lainnya
Collapsible di Superadmin meng-embed semua dashboard lain

acceptanceCriteria: Superadmin view renders AdminUser, AdminFinance, Asistenmu, and Concierge dashboards each inside their own Collapsible
Each Collapsible is open by default (defaultOpen)
Clicking a collapsible trigger toggles the visibility of that sub-dashboard
Dashboard names are shown as CardTitle in the CollapsibleTrigger

requirements.text: In the AdminUser dashboard ticket list, add Progress and Resolve action buttons for each ticket row. Pressing Progress opens an inline or modal area requiring a mandatory notes textarea; the action is only confirmed after notes are submitted. Pressing Resolve opens a modal with a mandatory notes textarea and a 'Resolve Tiket' confirmation button.

quotes: AdminUser dashboard: list Tiket tambahkan tombol Progress dan Resolve
untuk di semua dashboard saat menekan resolve munculkan field notes dan button resolve tiket ini

acceptanceCriteria: Each ticket row in AdminUser dashboard shows Progress and Resolve buttons
Clicking Progress opens a notes input area; submission is blocked until notes are filled
Clicking Resolve opens a modal with a mandatory Textarea for notes and a 'Resolve Tiket' button
The Resolve modal cannot be confirmed while notes field is empty
After confirmation, the modal closes and the ticket status updates accordingly in local state

requirements.text: In the Asistenmu dashboard, place the summary cards at the top, then immediately below add a 'Client Terkait' collapsible section (defaultOpen) showing a table of clients related to the current Asistenmu user. The table columns must be: ID Layanan, Tipe Layanan, Nama Client, Status Layanan, Unit Aktif, Share Layanan.

quotes: Di bawah card summary masukkan list client yang layanannya terkait dengan Iduser/principalId user Asistenmu
Id Layanan, Tiper Layanan, nama Client, status layanan, unit aktif dan share layanan

acceptanceCriteria: Summary cards appear at the top of the Asistenmu dashboard
A 'Client Terkait' collapsible section appears directly below summary cards
The table inside has columns: ID Layanan, Tipe Layanan, Nama Client, Status Layanan, Unit Aktif, Share Layanan
The section is open by default
Mock data is used to populate the table rows

requirements.text: In the Asistenmu dashboard, consolidate the task status cards (Permintaan Baru, QA Asistenmu, Revisi Client, Ditolak Partner, Review Client, Selesai) into a single collapsible 'Task Management' section. Each status is rendered as a sub-card within that section. For tasks under 'Ditolak Partner', show a 'Delegasikan Ulang' button that opens a modal displaying all task delegation fields — all fields except the Partner selection field must be read-only (pre-filled from the existing task data).

quotes: masukkan card Permintaan baru,QA Asistenmu,Revisi client,ditolak partner,review client,selesai kedalam satu section Task Management
di card Ditolak Partner di listnya begitu tombol delegasikan ulang ini hanya harus mengisi ulang partner saja untuk field lainnya tetap mengikuti yang sebelumnya
menampilkan semua field tapi field selain partner read only

acceptanceCriteria: A single 'Task Management' collapsible section contains all 6 status sub-cards
Tasks are filtered per sub-card by their status value
Tasks in 'Ditolak Partner' sub-card have a 'Delegasikan Ulang' button
Clicking 'Delegasikan Ulang' opens a modal with all delegation fields pre-filled
All fields except the Partner selection are read-only in that modal
Submitting the modal only requires selecting a new partner

requirements.text: In the Asistenmu dashboard ticket list, add Progress and Resolve action buttons to each ticket row. Both buttons require a mandatory notes textarea before confirming. Resolve opens a modal with a 'Resolve Tiket' button that is disabled until notes are filled.

quotes: di card Tiket tambahkan button progress dan resolve juga di list tiketnya
untuk di semua dashboard saat menekan resolve munculkan field notes dan button resolve tiket ini

acceptanceCriteria: Asistenmu ticket list rows each have Progress and Resolve buttons
Progress action requires mandatory notes before submitting
Resolve opens a modal with a mandatory notes Textarea and a 'Resolve Tiket' button
The Resolve button in the modal is disabled when notes are empty
After confirming, the modal closes and ticket status updates in local state

requirements.text: In the AdminFinance dashboard, replace the existing GMV summary cards (which currently show virtual/concierge breakdown) with per-service-type GMV cards showing values for: Tenang, Rapi, Fokus, Jaga, and Efisien.

quotes: summary card untuk GMV tipe layanan itu sesuaikan dengan jenis layanan yaitu Tenang,Rapi,Fokus,Jaga,Efisien

acceptanceCriteria: AdminFinance dashboard shows 5 GMV summary cards labeled Tenang, Rapi, Fokus, Jaga, Efisien
Each card shows a mock GMV value for that service type
Old GMV breakdown (virtual/concierge) is removed

requirements.text: In the AdminFinance dashboard Aktivasi Layanan form, replace the client dropdown with an autocomplete search input. The search must filter clients by name, user ID, or principal ID, showing matching suggestions as the user types. Selecting a suggestion populates the client field.

quotes: di card Aktivasi Layanan pilih client jangan dropdown tapi search auto complete by name/iduser/principalId

acceptanceCriteria: Client selection in Aktivasi Layanan uses an autocomplete search input instead of a dropdown
Typing in the field filters a dropdown list of suggestions by client name, user ID, or principal ID
Selecting a suggestion fills the client field with the chosen client's data
The rest of the form fields (Tipe Layanan, Unit Layanan, Harga per Unit, Tanggal Mulai, Sharing Layanan) remain unchanged

requirements.text: In the AdminFinance dashboard ticket list, add Progress and Resolve action buttons to each ticket row. Both buttons require a mandatory notes textarea before confirming the action. The Resolve action opens a modal with a 'Resolve Tiket' button that is disabled until notes are filled.

quotes: untuk di semua dashboard saat menekan resolve munculkan field notes dan button resolve tiket ini
card tiket list juga munculkan button Progress dan Resolve

acceptanceCriteria: AdminFinance ticket list rows each have Progress and Resolve buttons
Progress action requires a mandatory notes textarea before confirming
Resolve opens a modal with a mandatory notes Textarea and a 'Resolve Tiket' button
The Resolve button is disabled when notes are empty
After confirming, modal closes and ticket status updates in local state

constraints: All changes must be made only in frontend/src/pages/dashboard/internal.tsx
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Use existing Shadcn UI components (Collapsible, Card, Table, Button, Textarea, Dialog/Modal) already available in the project
Mock data patterns must remain consistent with existing mock data structure in internal.tsx
No backend changes required; all state is local/mock
nonGoals: Connecting ticket actions or task delegation to a live backend
Adding new roles or changing role-based access logic
Changing the routing or authentication logic
Modifying any public-facing pages or partner/client dashboards
